name: Custodian of the Two Holy Mosques Scholarship Program (KASP)
shortSummary: The flagship Saudi external scholarship program sending Saudi nationals to top global universities. Covers tuition, living, travel, and health insurance. Includes undergraduate degrees.
fieldsOfStudy: STEM, Medicine, Business, Law, Education, Tourism (aligned with Vision 2030)
academicElig: Saudi secondary certificate or equivalent; competitive GPA required
englishReq: IELTS or TOEFL (varies by track and university)
otherElig: Must be Saudi national; must obtain admission from approved university
importantNotes: Program aligned with Vision 2030 priorities. Scholarship renewable annually subject to academic progress.
linkNotes: Official KASP scholarship page on moe.gov.sa

name: Saudi Excellence Track External Scholarship
shortSummary: An excellence track within KASP targeting top Saudi students for admission to the world's most prestigious universities. Includes undergraduate.
fieldsOfStudy: Tourism, Hospitality, Business, HR, Sports Management, Environmental Sciences
academicElig: Strong academic record; competitive secondary school GPA
otherElig: Saudi national; unconditional admission from approved institution
applicationMethod: Online via Ministry of Education portal
importantNotes: Specializations rotate annually based on national priorities.
linkNotes: Official KASP page (Excellence Track is a sub-track)

name: Saudi Health Sector Scholarship Track
shortSummary: A dedicated KASP scholarship track targeting health sector specialties. Includes undergraduate medical and health science degrees.
fieldsOfStudy: Medicine, Nursing, Pharmacy, Dentistry, Health Sciences
academicElig: Strong academic record in science track
otherElig: Saudi national; admission to approved health program
importantNotes: Priority given to specializations with national workforce gaps.
linkNotes: Official MOE scholarship overview page

name: UAE MOHESR Overseas Scholarship Program
provider: Ministry of Higher Education and Scientific Research
shortSummary: The UAE federal scholarship program enabling Emirati nationals to study undergraduate degrees at approved top-ranked universities worldwide.
fieldsOfStudy: Priority: STEM, Medicine, Education (broad range accepted)
academicElig: Min 90% high school GPA for undergraduate
otherElig: Must be UAE national; university must be on MOHESR approved list
importantNotes: University must be ranked per MOHESR criteria (top 50 in field, top 100 in US/AU, top 200 in other countries, top 300 in non-English-speaking).
linkNotes: Official MOHESR scholarship service page on USP portal

name: ADEK Abu Dhabi Scholarship Program
provider: Abu Dhabi Department of Education and Knowledge
shortSummary: Abu Dhabi's government scholarship for Emirati students from Abu Dhabi to study undergraduate degrees at top-ranked global universities.
fieldsOfStudy: Priority fields aligned with Abu Dhabi Economic Vision
otherElig: Must be Abu Dhabi resident Emirati
applicationMethod: Via ADEK or coordinated through MOHESR
importantNotes: Specific eligibility may differ from federal MOHESR program.
linkNotes: No direct scholarship application page found on ADEK website

name: UAE MOHESR Internal Higher Education Registration
provider: Ministry of Higher Education and Scientific Research
shortSummary: The MOHESR registration pathway for UAE nationals to attend federal higher education institutions within the UAE, with government-covered tuition.
fieldsOfStudy: All available programs at UAE federal institutions
englishReq: EmSAT English or IELTS (varies by institution)
otherElig: Must be UAE national
importantNotes: Covers enrollment at federal UAE universities (UAEU, Zayed University, HCT, etc.).
linkNotes: Official NAPO service page on USP portal

name: Kuwait MOHE Scholarship Plan
shortSummary: The main annual scholarship plan of the Kuwait Ministry of Higher Education, sending Kuwaiti high school graduates to approved universities abroad for undergraduate study.
fieldsOfStudy: Broad range per annual plan announcement
englishReq: Academic IELTS 5.0+ or TOEFL 45+ from Kuwait-approved centers
otherElig: Kuwaiti national; secondary certificate validity max 2 years
requiredDocs: University admission letter certified by cultural office
Equivalence statement for foreign secondary certificates
importantNotes: Students given one year from admission date to achieve required IELTS/TOEFL. Must not be registered at Kuwait University or private universities.
linkNotes: Official scholarship plan registration page on MOHE portal

name: Kuwait Merit Scholarships Program
shortSummary: A competitive program sponsoring outstanding Kuwaiti students at the world's most distinguished universities for undergraduate study.
fieldsOfStudy: Per approved merit university list
otherElig: Must have acceptance from distinguished university per MOHE list
importantNotes: Governed by Ministerial Resolution No. 73 (2021). Distinguished university lists available at nbaq.edu.kw.
linkNotes: Official merit scholarship service page on MOHE portal

name: Kuwait Direct Medical Mission Scholarships
shortSummary: A specialized track for Kuwaiti students to pursue undergraduate medical degrees at distinguished universities abroad.
fieldsOfStudy: Medicine, Dentistry, Pharmacy, Health Sciences
academicElig: Kuwaiti secondary certificate; competitive GPA in science track
otherElig: Must not hold a university degree; must not be enrolled elsewhere
importantNotes: Applicants must have admission certified by cultural office in scholarship country.
linkNotes: Official medical mission service page on MOHE portal

name: Qatar MOEHE Government Scholarship
provider: Ministry of Education and Higher Education, Qatar
shortSummary: The Qatar Ministry of Education and Higher Education scholarship program for Qatari nationals to pursue undergraduate degrees at approved universities worldwide.
fieldsOfStudy: Aligned with Qatar National Vision 2030 priorities
academicElig: Qatari secondary certificate with competitive grades
otherElig: Must be Qatari national
importantNotes: University must be approved by MOEHE.
linkNotes: No direct scholarship application page found on edu.gov.qa

name: Qatar Foundation Scholarship Programs
shortSummary: Qatar Foundation supports Qatari students at Education City branch campuses (Carnegie Mellon, Georgetown, Northwestern, Texas A&M in Qatar) with full undergraduate scholarship funding.
fieldsOfStudy: Per Education City university offerings
academicElig: Strong academic record; SAT required for some campuses
otherElig: Qatari national; admission to Education City university
applicationMethod: Via individual university application + QF scholarship application
importantNotes: Each Education City campus has its own admission process.
linkNotes: qf.org.qa homepage does not link directly to a scholarship application page

name: Bahrain Ministry of Education Scholarships
shortSummary: The Bahrain Ministry of Education scholarship program for Bahraini nationals to pursue undergraduate degrees at approved universities locally and abroad.
fieldsOfStudy: Priority fields aligned with Bahrain Economic Vision 2030
otherElig: Must be Bahraini national
importantNotes: Program details announced annually by the Ministry.
linkNotes: No direct scholarship application page found on moe.gov.bh

name: Oman MOHERI External Scholarship Program
provider: Ministry of Higher Education, Research and Innovation, Oman
shortSummary: Oman's government scholarship program for Omani nationals to study undergraduate degrees at approved universities abroad.
fieldsOfStudy: Priority: Engineering, Medicine, IT, Sciences
otherElig: Must be Omani national
importantNotes: University approval required by MOHERI.
linkNotes: No direct scholarship application page found on moheri.gov.om

name: Oman Internal Scholarship Program
provider: Ministry of Higher Education, Research and Innovation, Oman
shortSummary: Oman's internal scholarship program placing Omani students in local and GCC higher education institutions for undergraduate study.
fieldsOfStudy: Broad range per annual allocation
otherElig: Omani national
importantNotes: Allocation based on annual seat availability at partner institutions.
linkNotes: No direct application page found on moheri.gov.om

name: Australia Awards Scholarships
shortSummary: Australian Government scholarships for individuals from developing countries to undertake full-time undergraduate study at participating Australian universities.
fieldsOfStudy: Aligned with development priorities of participating countries
otherElig: Citizen of eligible participating country; not currently military personnel
importantNotes: Must return to home country for 2 years after completion. Eligibility varies by country. Not all MENA countries are eligible.
linkNotes: Official Australia Awards page on Australian Government DFAT website

name: UAEU Chancellor's Scholarship for Elite Students
shortSummary: The Chancellor's Scholarship at UAEU provides 100% tuition fee coverage for elite international undergraduate students with exceptional high school results (98%+ or equivalent).
fieldsOfStudy: All colleges (Engineering, Business, Science, IT, Law, Health, Agriculture)
academicElig: High school score of 98% or above
otherElig: New international students; SAT Math 730+ for STEM colleges
importantNotes: Must maintain cumulative GPA of 3.6 or above. Scholarship revoked for academic/behavioral violations.
linkNotes: Official UAEU undergraduate scholarship page

name: UAEU Chancellor's 75% Scholarship
shortSummary: A competitive UAEU scholarship covering 75% of tuition fees for high-achieving international undergraduate students with secondary school scores of 97% or above.
fieldsOfStudy: All colleges
academicElig: High school score of 97% or above
otherElig: New international students
importantNotes: Must maintain minimum GPA to retain scholarship.
linkNotes: Official UAEU undergraduate scholarship page

name: UAEU Chancellor's Scholarship for Talented Students
shortSummary: 100% tuition scholarship for students with exceptional abilities in innovative, artistic, athletic, or technological fields, recognizing achievements at local or international level.
fieldsOfStudy: All colleges
otherElig: Must provide evidence of talent (certificates, awards, participation records)
importantNotes: Must maintain GPA of 3.6+. Additional tests or interviews may be required.
linkNotes: Official UAEU undergraduate scholarship page

name: AUS President's Scholarship
shortSummary: AUS's most prestigious scholarship covering 100% tuition, lab fees, monthly stipend, on-campus housing, and medical insurance. Open to students who completed secondary education outside the UAE.
fieldsOfStudy: All AUS colleges (Engineering, Business, Arts & Sciences, Architecture)
otherElig: Must have completed secondary education outside the UAE; up to 20 awards/year
importantNotes: Renewable for students meeting scholarship requirements. Up to 20 recipients annually.
linkNotes: Official AUS grants and scholarships page

name: AUS Merit Scholarships
shortSummary: Automatic merit-based scholarships for undergraduate applicants with high school averages of 90% or above. Distinguished Student Scholarship (95%+) covers 20%; Academic Achiever (90-94.99%) covers 10%.
fieldsOfStudy: All AUS colleges
academicElig: High school average 90%+ (10% award) or 95%+ (20% award)
otherElig: Automatically offered at time of admission; no separate application
importantNotes: No separate application required. Contingent on available funding.
linkNotes: Official AUS grants and scholarships page

name: AUS Financial Grant
shortSummary: Need-based financial grants for undergraduate students at AUS with demonstrated limited financial resources. Amount depends on financial needs and academic qualifications.
fieldsOfStudy: All AUS colleges
otherElig: Must demonstrate limited financial resources; must have paid seat reservation deposit
importantNotes: Application processed within two weeks of complete submission.
linkNotes: Official AUS grants and scholarships page

name: Khalifa University Undergraduate Scholarship
shortSummary: Full scholarship for undergraduate students at Khalifa University in Abu Dhabi, covering tuition for STEM and medicine programs. Full scholarships for UAE nationals; merit-based for international students.
fieldsOfStudy: Engineering, Computer Science, Sciences, Medicine
academicElig: Competitive high school GPA; entrance exam may be required
otherElig: Full scholarships for UAE nationals. International merit scholarships available.
importantNotes: Acceptance rate approximately 9%. Admission interview required.
linkNotes: Official KU application page

name: NYU Abu Dhabi Full Financial Aid
shortSummary: NYU Abu Dhabi provides full need-based financial aid covering tuition, housing, dining, textbooks, and travel to all admitted students regardless of nationality. One of the most generous aid programs globally.
fieldsOfStudy: 26 majors including Engineering, Sciences, Social Sciences, Arts, Humanities
academicElig: Exceptional academic record; highly selective (~4% acceptance rate)
otherElig: Must apply via Common App; CSS Profile required for financial aid
importantNotes: ~4% acceptance rate. Students from 115+ countries. Required study-away semester at NYU global site.
linkNotes: Official NYUAD financial aid page

name: University of Sharjah Undergraduate Scholarships
shortSummary: The University of Sharjah offers merit-based undergraduate scholarships for domestic and international students across all colleges. Coverage varies by academic achievement.
fieldsOfStudy: All colleges
otherElig: Open to all nationalities
applicationMethod: Via University of Sharjah online admission portal
importantNotes: Admission periods announced per semester.
linkNotes: Specific scholarship application page not found on sharjah.ac.ae

name: American University in Dubai Scholarships
shortSummary: AUD offers merit-based and need-based scholarships for undergraduate students, including full and partial tuition coverage, living allowances, and accommodation support.
fieldsOfStudy: Business, Engineering, Architecture, Communication, Education
otherElig: Open to international students
importantNotes: Multiple scholarship tiers available.
linkNotes: No direct scholarship-specific application page verified on aud.edu

name: Canadian University Dubai Scholarships
shortSummary: Canadian University Dubai offers merit-based and need-based scholarships for undergraduate students including tuition reductions and financial hardship support.
fieldsOfStudy: Business, Engineering, Architecture, Communication, IT
otherElig: Community service (15 hrs/month) required for some scholarships
importantNotes: Scholarships valid for one semester; must reapply each term.
linkNotes: No direct scholarship page verified on cud.ac.ae

name: Hamad Bin Khalifa University Scholarships
shortSummary: HBKU in Education City, Qatar offers fully funded scholarships for undergraduate students including tuition, housing, and living stipend. Part of Qatar Foundation.
fieldsOfStudy: Islamic Studies, Humanities, Social Sciences, Science, Engineering
otherElig: Open to all nationalities
importantNotes: Part of Qatar Foundation Education City. Qatari nationals may receive additional QF support.
linkNotes: No direct undergraduate scholarship page verified on hbku.edu.qa

name: King Saud University International Scholarship
shortSummary: King Saud University offers fully funded scholarships for international undergraduate students including tuition, housing, monthly stipend, and return flights.
fieldsOfStudy: All KSU colleges (Medicine, Engineering, Business, Sciences, Arts)
englishReq: Not specified (Arabic proficiency may be required for some programs)
otherElig: Open to international students
importantNotes: One of the oldest and largest universities in Saudi Arabia.
linkNotes: No direct international scholarship application page verified on ksu.edu.sa

name: Qatar University International Student Scholarship
shortSummary: Qatar University offers merit-based scholarships for international undergraduate students. Coverage varies by academic achievement and program.
fieldsOfStudy: All QU colleges (Engineering, Business, Arts, Sciences, Education, Health)
otherElig: Non-Qatari nationals; Qatari nationals study tuition-free
importantNotes: Qatari nationals study tuition-free. International student fees apply.
linkNotes: No direct scholarship-specific page verified on qu.edu.qa

name: Ajman University Scholarships
shortSummary: Ajman University offers merit-based scholarships for undergraduate students including tuition discounts based on high school performance.
fieldsOfStudy: Business, Engineering, IT, Pharmacy, Dentistry, Mass Communication
otherElig: Open to all nationalities
importantNotes: Scholarship percentage varies by GPA.
linkNotes: No direct scholarship page verified on ajman.ac.ae

name: University of Dubai International Scholarship
shortSummary: The University of Dubai offers partial scholarships for international undergraduate students to help finance their studies across business, engineering, and IT programs.
fieldsOfStudy: Business, Engineering, IT, Law
academicElig: Must be admitted to a UoD undergraduate program
otherElig: International students
importantNotes: Rolling deadline — applications accepted throughout the year.
linkNotes: No direct scholarship page verified on ud.ac.ae

name: Qatar Airways University National Scholarship
shortSummary: A fully funded scholarship program by Qatar Airways for Qatari nationals to pursue undergraduate degrees in aviation, engineering, and business-related fields.
fieldsOfStudy: Aviation, Engineering, Business, IT
otherElig: Qatari nationals only
importantNotes: Linked to employment pathway with Qatar Airways after graduation.
linkNotes: No direct scholarship application page verified

name: University of Birmingham Dubai Academic Excellence Scholarship
shortSummary: Academic Excellence Scholarships at the University of Birmingham Dubai campus, covering up to 50% of tuition for high-achieving undergraduate students. UK-quality degrees awarded by University of Birmingham.
fieldsOfStudy: Business, Engineering, Computer Science, Education
otherElig: Open to all nationalities
applicationMethod: Via University of Birmingham Dubai admissions
importantNotes: Degrees awarded by University of Birmingham (UK). Located in Dubai International Academic City.
linkNotes: No direct scholarship page verified on birmingham.ac.uk/dubai

name: Heriot-Watt University Dubai Scholarships
shortSummary: Heriot-Watt University Dubai offers merit-based scholarships and early bird discounts for undergraduate students. UK-accredited degrees in engineering, business, and computing.
fieldsOfStudy: Engineering, Business, Computer Science, Built Environment
otherElig: Open to all nationalities
importantNotes: UK-accredited degrees. Located in Dubai International Academic City.
linkNotes: No direct scholarship page verified on hw.ac.uk/dubai

name: Saudi Aramco College Degree Program (CDPNE)
shortSummary: Aramco's highly selective scholarship for Saudi high school graduates. Includes a 10-month preparatory program in Dhahran, then full sponsorship for a bachelor's degree at KFUPM or a top international university, with guaranteed employment upon graduation.
fieldsOfStudy: Engineering, Geoscience, Computer Science, Business (aligned with Aramco strategic needs)
academicElig: Min 85% high school GPA; competitive aptitude tests
englishReq: TOEFL or IELTS (assessed during preparatory program)
otherElig: Saudi national; must pass Aramco placement tests and medical assessment
importantNotes: Includes 10-month College Preparatory Program in Dhahran. Graduates receive employment with Aramco. Over 2,000 graduates since program inception.
linkNotes: Official Aramco human capital development page describing CDPNE

name: ADNOC Accelerator Program Scholars
shortSummary: ADNOC's prestigious scholarship for UAE nationals, supporting undergraduate study at 80+ approved universities worldwide in disciplines aligned with the UAE's energy sector objectives. Established in 1974.
fieldsOfStudy: Chemical Engineering, Petroleum Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Geoscience, Computer Science, AI, Data Science, Finance, Law, Economics
academicElig: 85%+ high school for domestic study; 90%+ for overseas; IB 36+ points
englishReq: IELTS 6.0+ or TOEFL 80+ or EmSAT English 1400+
otherElig: UAE national; conditional acceptance from ADNOC approved university; medical assessment; military service clearance if applicable
applicationMethod: Online via ADNOC scholarship application portal
importantNotes: University list includes 80+ institutions from Times Top 100. Established 1974 — one of the oldest corporate scholarship programs in the UAE.
linkNotes: Official ADNOC scholarship application portal

name: QatarEnergy University Scholarship Program
shortSummary: QatarEnergy's scholarship program for Qatari students to pursue higher education locally and overseas in disciplines aligned with the energy sector. Includes employment pathway after graduation.
fieldsOfStudy: Engineering, Geoscience, IT, Business (energy sector aligned)
academicElig: Recent high school graduate (current year or previous year)
otherElig: Qatari national only; cannot defer scholarship

coverageDetails.other: Employment pathway with energy sector company

importantNotes: Multiple application cycles per year. Scholarship cannot be deferred. Allocated to specific energy sector company.
linkNotes: Official QatarEnergy scholarship programs page

name: PDO Scholarship Scheme
shortSummary: PDO's flagship scholarship program sponsoring Omani students for bachelor's and master's degrees at universities in Oman and abroad. Over 2,000 graduates since inception in the 1980s.
fieldsOfStudy: Petroleum Engineering, Chemical Engineering, Geophysics, IT, Business, Economics
otherElig: Omani national; aligned with PDO workforce needs
importantNotes: Over 2,000 scholars have graduated since the 1980s. Includes both domestic and overseas study options.
linkNotes: PDO scholarship details on pdo.co.om but no direct public application portal found

name: SABIC Scholarship Program
shortSummary: SABIC sponsors Saudi nationals for undergraduate degrees in engineering, chemistry, and business disciplines aligned with the company's industrial and strategic needs.
fieldsOfStudy: Chemical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Industrial Chemistry, Business
academicElig: Competitive high school GPA in science track
otherElig: Saudi national; alignment with SABIC workforce needs
importantNotes: Employment commitment with SABIC upon graduation.
linkNotes: No direct scholarship application page found on sabic.com

name: Kuwait Petroleum Corporation Scholarship Program
shortSummary: KPC sponsors Kuwaiti nationals for undergraduate degrees in engineering and technical disciplines aligned with the oil and gas sector's workforce needs.
fieldsOfStudy: Petroleum Engineering, Chemical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Electrical Engineering, IT
otherElig: Kuwaiti national; alignment with KPC sector needs
applicationMethod: Via KPC or subsidiary company recruitment
importantNotes: KPC group includes Kuwait Oil Company, KNPC, KIPIC, and others. Scholarship may be through subsidiary companies.
linkNotes: No direct public scholarship application portal found on kpc.com.kw

name: Emirates Group Scholarship Program
shortSummary: The Emirates Group (Emirates airline) scholarship for UAE nationals to study undergraduate degrees in aviation, engineering, business, and IT, with a career pathway within the Emirates Group.
fieldsOfStudy: Aviation, Engineering, Business, IT, Finance
otherElig: UAE national; aligned with Emirates Group workforce needs
importantNotes: Coordinated with MOHESR. Linked to employment within Emirates Group companies.
linkNotes: No direct public scholarship page found. Program announced via MOHESR coordination.

name: RTA Dubai Scholarship Program
shortSummary: RTA Dubai sponsors Emirati students for undergraduate degrees in engineering, transport planning, urban mobility, and IT disciplines aligned with Dubai's transport sector needs.
fieldsOfStudy: Civil Engineering, Transport Engineering, Urban Planning, IT
otherElig: UAE national; aligned with RTA workforce needs
importantNotes: Employment commitment with RTA upon graduation.
linkNotes: No direct public scholarship page found on rta.ae

name: Dubai Police Scholarship Program
shortSummary: Dubai Police sponsors Emirati students for undergraduate degrees in criminology, forensic science, cybersecurity, law, and policing-related disciplines.
fieldsOfStudy: Criminology, Forensic Science, Cybersecurity, Law, Public Safety
otherElig: UAE national; must meet Dubai Police eligibility criteria including fitness and background checks
importantNotes: Employment commitment with Dubai Police upon graduation. Physical fitness requirements apply.
linkNotes: No direct public scholarship page found on dubaipolice.gov.ae

name: e& (Etisalat) Scholarship Program
shortSummary: e& (formerly Etisalat) sponsors UAE nationals for undergraduate degrees in telecommunications, IT, computer science, cybersecurity, and business disciplines.
fieldsOfStudy: Telecommunications, IT, Computer Science, Cybersecurity, Data Science, Business
academicElig: Competitive high school results; preference for STEM track
otherElig: UAE national; aligned with e& workforce needs
importantNotes: Employment commitment with e& group upon graduation.
linkNotes: No direct public scholarship page found on eand.com

name: Mubadala Scholarship Program
shortSummary: Mubadala sponsors UAE nationals for undergraduate degrees in engineering, finance, technology, and aerospace disciplines aligned with the company's portfolio sectors.
fieldsOfStudy: Engineering, Finance, Technology, Aerospace, Energy, Healthcare
otherElig: UAE national; aligned with Mubadala portfolio sector needs

coverageDetails.other: Career pathway with Mubadala portfolio companies

importantNotes: Mubadala portfolio spans aerospace (Strata), healthcare (Cleveland Clinic AD), technology, and energy sectors.
linkNotes: No direct public scholarship page found on mubadala.com

name: Saudi Electricity Company Scholarship Program
shortSummary: SEC sponsors Saudi nationals for undergraduate degrees in electrical engineering, power systems, and technical disciplines aligned with the Kingdom's electricity sector needs.
fieldsOfStudy: Electrical Engineering, Power Systems, Mechanical Engineering, IT
academicElig: Competitive high school GPA in science track
otherElig: Saudi national; aligned with SEC workforce needs
importantNotes: Employment commitment with SEC upon graduation.
linkNotes: No direct public scholarship page found on se.com.sa

name: Ma'aden Scholarship Program
shortSummary: Ma'aden sponsors Saudi nationals for undergraduate degrees in mining engineering, geology, chemical engineering, and industrial disciplines aligned with the Kingdom's mining sector.
fieldsOfStudy: Mining Engineering, Geology, Chemical Engineering, Metallurgy, Industrial Engineering
otherElig: Saudi national; aligned with Ma'aden workforce needs
importantNotes: Ma'aden is the largest multi-commodity mining company in the Middle East.
linkNotes: No direct public scholarship page found on maaden.com.sa

name: Dubai Health Authority Scholarship Program
shortSummary: DHA sponsors Emirati students for undergraduate degrees in medicine, nursing, pharmacy, health sciences, and biomedical disciplines to develop Dubai's healthcare workforce.
fieldsOfStudy: Medicine, Nursing, Pharmacy, Biomedical Sciences, Health Administration
academicElig: Competitive high school results in science track
otherElig: UAE national; aligned with DHA health workforce needs
importantNotes: Employment commitment with DHA upon graduation.
linkNotes: No direct public scholarship page found on dha.gov.ae

name: Abu Dhabi Police Scholarship Program
shortSummary: Abu Dhabi Police sponsors Emirati students for undergraduate degrees in law, forensic science, cybersecurity, and policing-related disciplines.
fieldsOfStudy: Law, Forensic Science, Cybersecurity, Criminal Justice, Public Safety
otherElig: UAE national; must meet Abu Dhabi Police eligibility criteria

coverageDetails.other: Employment pathway with Abu Dhabi Police

importantNotes: Employment commitment with Abu Dhabi Police upon graduation.
linkNotes: No direct public scholarship page found on adpolice.gov.ae

name: Tamkeen Education Support Programs
shortSummary: Tamkeen, Bahrain's Labour Fund, provides education support and training subsidies for Bahraini nationals to pursue undergraduate degrees and professional qualifications.
fieldsOfStudy: Broad range (aligned with Bahrain labour market needs)
academicElig: Bahraini national with eligible academic background
otherElig: Bahraini national
importantNotes: Tamkeen is a semi-government entity focused on developing Bahrain's private sector workforce.
linkNotes: No direct scholarship application page found on tamkeen.bh. Programs vary seasonally.

name: Omantel Scholarship Program
shortSummary: Omantel sponsors Omani nationals for undergraduate degrees in telecommunications, IT, computer science, and business disciplines aligned with the company's needs.
fieldsOfStudy: Telecommunications, IT, Computer Science, Data Science, Business
otherElig: Omani national; aligned with Omantel workforce needs
importantNotes: Employment commitment with Omantel upon graduation.
linkNotes: No direct public scholarship page found on omantel.om

name: Saudia Airlines Scholarship Program
shortSummary: Saudia sponsors Saudi nationals for undergraduate degrees in aviation, aerospace engineering, business administration, and IT aligned with the airline's operational needs.
fieldsOfStudy: Aviation, Aerospace Engineering, Business Administration, IT, Logistics
otherElig: Saudi national; aligned with Saudia workforce needs
importantNotes: Employment commitment with Saudi Arabian Airlines upon graduation.
linkNotes: No direct public scholarship page found on saudia.com

name: UAE Ministry of Interior Scholarship Program
shortSummary: The UAE Ministry of Interior sponsors Emirati students for undergraduate degrees in law, security studies, IT, criminal justice, and related disciplines.
fieldsOfStudy: Law, Security Studies, Criminal Justice, IT, Cybersecurity
otherElig: UAE national; must meet MOI eligibility criteria including background checks
importantNotes: Employment commitment with Ministry of Interior upon graduation.
linkNotes: No direct public scholarship page found on moi.gov.ae

name: Türkiye Bursları (Turkey Government Scholarship)
provider: Presidency for Turks Abroad and Related Communities (YTB)
shortSummary: Türkiye Bursları is the Turkish Government's fully funded scholarship for international students worldwide. Covers tuition, accommodation, monthly stipend, health insurance, flights, and one year of Turkish language training.
fieldsOfStudy: All fields (Engineering, Health Sciences, Humanities, Social Sciences, Sciences)
academicElig: Min 70% high school GPA; 90%+ for Medical programs
englishReq: Not required (1-year Turkish language course provided)
otherElig: Must be under 21 for undergraduate; must not hold Turkish citizenship; university placement provided
applicationMethod: Online via Türkiye Bursları Application System (TBBS)

coverageDetails.other: Health insurance + accommodation + 1-year Turkish language course

importantNotes: Competitive: ~57,000 applications, ~4,500 awards annually. University placement included — students do not need to apply to universities separately.
linkNotes: Official TBBS application portal

name: Stipendium Hungaricum Scholarship (Hungary)
shortSummary: The Hungarian Government's fully funded scholarship for students from partner countries. Covers tuition, accommodation contribution, monthly stipend, and health insurance at 30+ Hungarian universities with ~800 English-taught programs.
fieldsOfStudy: All fields (~800 programs in English, Hungarian, German, French)
academicElig: Must have completed secondary education; age 18+ by start date
otherElig: Must be citizen of a Stipendium Hungaricum partner country; cannot hold Hungarian citizenship
applicationMethod: Online via DreamApply system + nominating body in home country

coverageDetails.other: Accommodation contribution + health insurance + Hungarian language course

importantNotes: Must apply through both the online system AND the national nominating body in your home country. Eligibility varies by sending partner country.
linkNotes: Official Stipendium Hungaricum application portal

name: Islamic Development Bank (IsDB) Scholarship Program
shortSummary: The IsDB scholarship funds students from member countries for bachelor's degrees in Science and Technology fields. In Turkey, administered jointly with YTB. Structured as an interest-free loan (Qard-Hasan) repaid after graduation.
fieldsOfStudy: Science and Technology subjects for development
otherElig: Citizen of IsDB member country; for bachelor's, scholarship is an interest-free loan repaid after graduation
applicationMethod: Online via Türkiye Bursları (for Turkey track) or IsDB portal
importantNotes: Bachelor's scholarship is structured as Qard-Hasan (interest-free loan) repaid in easy installments after graduation and employment.
linkNotes: Official YTB-IsDB joint program announcement on Türkiye Bursları

name: Mastercard Foundation Scholars Program
shortSummary: The Mastercard Foundation Scholars Program provides full scholarships at partner universities worldwide for academically talented yet economically disadvantaged young people, primarily from Africa and developing regions.
fieldsOfStudy: All fields (varies by partner university)
academicElig: Strong academic record; demonstrated financial need
otherElig: From economically disadvantaged background; committed to giving back to community
applicationMethod: Via partner university application (each has own process)
importantNotes: Partner universities include Arizona State, McGill, University of Edinburgh, KNUST, and others. Each university manages its own selection process.
linkNotes: Official Mastercard Foundation Scholars page

name: Lester B. Pearson International Scholarship (UofT)
deadline: School nomination by Nov; student application by Jan
shortSummary: The University of Toronto's most prestigious scholarship for exceptional international students. Covers tuition, books, incidental fees, and full residence support for four years of undergraduate study.
fieldsOfStudy: All UofT undergraduate programs
academicElig: Exceptional academic achievement; nominated by school
otherElig: Must be international student; must be nominated by their school; currently in final year of secondary school
applicationMethod: School nomination + UofT application via OUAC
importantNotes: Two-stage process: school nominates student, then student applies. One of Canada's most prestigious undergraduate scholarships.
linkNotes: Official UofT Pearson scholarship page

name: UCL Global Undergraduate Scholarship
shortSummary: UCL's scholarship for high-achieving international undergraduate students, providing £5,000 per year toward tuition fees. Available across all UCL undergraduate programs.
fieldsOfStudy: All UCL undergraduate programs
academicElig: Strong academic record meeting UCL offer conditions
otherElig: Must be classified as overseas fee-paying student; must hold a UCL offer
applicationMethod: Automatic consideration for eligible UCL offer holders
importantNotes: No separate application — automatically considered based on UCAS application and academic performance.
linkNotes: Official UCL scholarship page

name: Melbourne International Undergraduate Scholarship
shortSummary: The University of Melbourne offers competitive scholarships for high-achieving international undergraduate students, covering up to 100% of tuition fees depending on academic merit.
fieldsOfStudy: All Melbourne undergraduate programs
otherElig: Must be international student; must apply for undergraduate admission at Melbourne
importantNotes: No separate scholarship application — automatically considered based on academic merit during admission.
linkNotes: Official UoM scholarship page

name: UBC International Scholars Program
shortSummary: UBC's flagship scholarship program for outstanding international undergraduate students, offering awards from partial tuition to full cost of attendance including tuition, fees, living costs, and more.
fieldsOfStudy: All UBC undergraduate programs
otherElig: Must be international student applying to UBC for the first time
applicationMethod: Via UBC undergraduate application (scholarship consideration included)

coverageDetails.stipend: May include living costs for top awards

importantNotes: UBC International Scholars are selected during the admission review process. The Karen McKellin International Leader of Tomorrow Award is the top tier.
renewable: Yes (4 years, subject to academic standing)
linkNotes: Official UBC international scholarships page

name: Romanian Government Scholarship
shortSummary: The Romanian Government offers fully funded scholarships for citizens of non-EU countries to pursue undergraduate studies at Romanian public universities, covering tuition, accommodation, and a monthly stipend.
fieldsOfStudy: All fields available at Romanian public universities
otherElig: Must be citizen of non-EU country; must not already hold Romanian citizenship
applicationMethod: Via Romanian diplomatic missions in home country
importantNotes: Applications submitted through Romanian embassy or consulate in applicant's home country.
applicationWebsiteName: Romanian Ministry of Foreign Affairs — Scholarships
linkNotes: Official Romanian MFA scholarships page

name: Brunei Darussalam Government Scholarship
shortSummary: The Government of Brunei Darussalam offers fully funded scholarships for international students to study undergraduate programs at Brunei universities, covering tuition, monthly allowance, accommodation, and flights.
fieldsOfStudy: All fields available at Brunei universities (varies annually)
otherElig: Must be 18-25 years old; must be medically fit
applicationMethod: Via Brunei diplomatic missions or Ministry of Foreign Affairs

coverageDetails.other: Accommodation + medical/dental benefits + annual book allowance

importantNotes: Applications typically through Brunei embassy in applicant's home country. Annual allowance and benefits provided.
linkNotes: Official Brunei MFA scholarship page

name: Russian Government Scholarship (State Quota)
shortSummary: The Russian Government allocates state-funded quota places for international students to study for free at Russian universities, covering tuition with optional preparatory Russian language year.
fieldsOfStudy: All fields available at Russian state universities
englishReq: Russian language required (1-year prep course available); some English-taught programs exist
otherElig: Must be citizen of eligible country
applicationMethod: Via Rossotrudnichestvo or Russian embassy in home country, or via education-in-russia.com portal

coverageDetails.other: Dormitory accommodation available + Russian language preparatory year

importantNotes: Applications via Russian diplomatic missions or Rossotrudnichestvo offices.
linkNotes: Official Russian government education portal for international students

importantNotes: 250 awards annually. Eligible applicants contacted after receiving admissions offer. Selection panels in Mar/Apr and May.
